# Makyneta Unipessoal, Lda.

[![GitHub Pages](https://img.shields.io/badge/GitHub%20Pages-Deployed-brightgreen)](https://makyneta.github.io)
[![License](https://img.shields.io/badge/License-MIT-blue.svg)](LICENSE)

> _Life, Uncomplicated._  
> A minimalist portfolio website showcasing the work of Tomás Mota, built with simplicity and purpose in mind.

## 📖 Overview

Makyneta Unipessoal, Lda. is the professional portfolio website of Tomás Mota, a multimedia technician and creative professional. This site serves as a digital showcase for design, development, music, photography, and blog content, emphasizing clean design, fast loading, and direct user experience.

The philosophy behind the site is to keep things uncomplicated—minimalist design, direct access to content, and no unnecessary clutter. Every element is crafted to highlight the work without distractions.

## ✨ Features

- **Portfolio Sections**: Dedicated pages for Design, Development, Photography, and Blog
- **Responsive Design**: Optimized for all devices and screen sizes
- **Fast Loading**: Lightweight HTML/CSS/JS with no heavy frameworks
- **SEO Optimized**: Clean URLs and meta tags for better discoverability
- **Contact Integration**: Easy-to-find contact information and social links
- **Blog System**: JSON-driven blog with categories and tags
- **Gallery System**: Photo and project galleries with filtering

## 🛠️ Technology Stack

- **Frontend**: Pure HTML5, CSS3, Vanilla JavaScript
- **Hosting**: GitHub Pages (free and integrated)
- **Version Control**: Git
- **Content Management**: JSON files for dynamic content (blog, photos, etc.)
- **Build Tools**: None required—static site deployment

## 🚀 Deployment

This site is automatically deployed via [GitHub Pages](https://pages.github.com) whenever changes are pushed to the `main` branch.

### Local Development

1. Clone the repository:
   ```bash
   git clone https://github.com/makyneta/makyneta.github.io.git
   cd makyneta.github.io
   ```

2. Open `index.html` in your browser or use a local server:
   ```bash
   # Using Python (if available)
   python -m http.server 8000
   # Then visit http://localhost:8000
   ```

3. Make changes and commit:
   ```bash
   git add .
   git commit -m "Your commit message"
   git push origin main
   ```

The site will automatically update on GitHub Pages.

## 📁 Project Structure

```
makyneta.github.io/
├── index.html              # Homepage
├── about.html              # About page
├── blog.html               # Blog listing
├── design.html             # Design portfolio
├── dev.html                # Development portfolio
├── music.html              # Music portfolio
├── photo.html              # Photography portfolio
├── contact.html            # Contact page
├── assets/
│   ├── styles/             # CSS files
│   ├── scripts/            # JavaScript files
│   ├── images/             # Images and media
│   └── data/               # JSON data files
├── news/                   # Blog post pages
├── archive/                # Archived content
└── .github/                # GitHub-specific files
```

## 🤝 Contributing

This is a personal portfolio site, so contributions are not typically accepted. However, if you find bugs or have suggestions for improvements, feel free to open an issue or contact me directly.
